arts.ttl: Serie A | Como v Parma: Match Preview
arts.sum: This Saturday, the Stadio Giuseppe Sinigaglia will host a pivotal match between Como and Parma, two teams promoted from Serie B last season and now fighting to establish themselves in Italy’s top flight. Both sides have experienced mixed fortunes in their return to Serie A, making this encounter particularly significant in their quest for survival. Como, under the guidance of former Arsenal and Barcelona star Cesc Fabregas, have shown signs of adaptation to Serie A after a challenging start. arts.ttl: Messi praises Nico Paz as Milan and Napoli show Interest in Como’s rising star
arts.sum: Lionel Messi has given a glowing endorsement of Nico Paz, the young talent currently playing for Como in Serie A. The Argentine superstar stated, “Nico has many qualities and understands the game perfectly. He has an impressive mind and is working with a coach who is my friend (Cesc Fabregas) who will help him grow even more.” Calciomercato’s Daniele Longo reports how Paz, who is on loan from Real Madrid, has been turning heads with his performances for both Como and the Argentina national team.
